idea-plugin.name: Fish Audio MCP
idea-plugin.description:
Text-to-Speech via Fish Audio through the AceDataCloud Fish Audio API, exposed over Model Context Protocol (MCP).

This plugin sets up the MCP Fish Audio server for JetBrains AI Assistant. Once configured, AI Assistant can synthesise natural-sounding speech from text, list available voice models, and track the status of generation tasks — all powered by Ace Data Cloud.

Features

  • 6 MCP Tools — Generate speech, list and inspect voice models, track task status
  • Voice Conditioning — Reference an existing Fish Audio voice by ID
  • Easy Setup — One-click copy MCP configuration for AI Assistant
  • Dual Mode — STDIO (local) and HTTP (remote) server support
  • Token Management — Store API token securely in IDE settings

Available Tools

  • fish_generate_audio — Submit a TTS task (text + model + optional reference voice)
  • fish_get_task / fish_get_tasks_batch — Poll one or many TTS jobs
  • fish_list_models / fish_get_model — Discover and inspect Fish voice models
  • fish_get_usage_guide — Concise client-side usage reference

Quick Start

  1. Install this plugin
  2. Open Settings → Tools → Fish Audio MCP
  3. Enter your Ace Data Cloud API token
  4. Click Copy Config and paste into Settings → Tools → AI Assistant → MCP

Requires uv (Python package runner) for STDIO mode, or use HTTP mode for zero-install remote access.

action.description: Copy STDIO MCP configuration for AI Assistant
Copy HTTP MCP configuration for AI Assistant

idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0

  • Initial release
  • MCP server integration with JetBrains AI Assistant
  • STDIO and HTTP transport modes
  • Settings UI for API token management
  • One-click MCP config copy
